'''Ranklinge City''' was the capital of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ranklinge]]. It was located in the northern continent and had a population of around 100,000. The [[City/Legends|city]] had an [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation]] plant on its outskirts that produced [[I-7 Howlrunner]]s.

==Appearances==
